achievements.title: Built S3 Library Platform from Problem to Product
achievements.description: Designed and developed a SaaS platform focused on solving operational challenges faced by local libraries.
highlights: Handled complete development including backend, frontend, database, and deployment workflows.
Built features for subscriptions, seat management, attendance tracking, and admin operations.
Learned practical product validation, user feedback handling, and real-world adoption challenges.

achievements.title: Worked on Production SaaS Backends
achievements.description: Worked on backend systems for SaaS applications involving APIs, payments, authentication, and business workflows.
highlights: Built and maintained REST APIs for core application modules.
Integrated Stripe and Razorpay with webhook-based payment handling.
Focused on backend structure, maintainability, and reliable workflow implementation.

achievements.title: Built Real-Time Systems Beyond Standard CRUD
achievements.description: Developed real-time applications to improve understanding of event-driven systems and multi-user interactions.
highlights: Worked on synchronization, responsiveness, and live state handling.
Strengthened backend architecture and real-time workflow understanding.

achievements.title: Developed Workflow-Focused SaaS Features
achievements.description: Built workflow-driven systems focused on practical operations and maintainable architecture.
highlights: Worked on authentication systems, role management, and admin workflows.
Built API-driven frontend and backend integrations.
Focused on simple architecture and usability for real-world scenarios.

achievements.title: Independent Product-Oriented Development
achievements.description: Continuously building practical products and improving backend-focused full-stack development skills.
highlights: Comfortable handling projects independently from idea to implementation.
Focused on practical problem solving and maintainable systems.
Interested in SaaS products, APIs, workflows, and real-time applications.
